actionable_feedback: Remove safety-blocker records from any ROI/economic ranking outputs in the workbook and memo, or clearly label them as 'excluded - safety blocker'. Update the Record-Level Rationale table to omit economic_rank for blocked records (e.g., R3) and add a clear note that safety blockers supersede ROI.

Make the workbook verifiable without special parsing tools: add an 'Inputs' sheet with named cells for all threshold parameters (e.g., pm25_outdoor_threshold, filter_merv_min, recirc_pct_max, hard_threshold_record_count, decision_budget_usd) and include explicit cell addresses in the memo (e.g., 'See Inputs!B2').

Add a 'Formula map' or 'Checks' sheet that lists the exact formulas and cell references used for key flags and calculations (e.g., blocker logic, blocker_count, needs_review, technical_score, economic_proxy). If possible, include a plain-text export (or screenshot) of these formula cells in the repository for reviewers without openpyxl.

Embed provisional cost assumptions in a 'Cost assumptions' sheet (per-intervention cost or cost ranges) and implement budget-adherence checks that compare mitigation totals to decision_budget_usd; include sensitivity tests on cost ranges and report whether budget is achievable.

Remove macros/external dependencies or ensure workbook is authored in a way that common tools (Excel, LibreOffice, openpyxl) can parse formulas. If any logic is implemented programmatically, include a short 'Build notes' section documenting how the XLSX was generated and where formulas reside.

Fix metadata/information contradictions: ensure any metadata fields (passed_criteria / failed_criteria) reported in artifacts or summary outputs consistently reflect ri_4 as failed until corrected; update the memo to explicitly state which rubric items have been met and which are pending correction.
Re-run verification in an environment with an XLSX parser (openpyxl/xlsxwriter) or provide plain-text/formula exports so graders can confirm formula-driven checks and budget calculations.
artifact_specific_comments: facilities_memo.md: Clear and well-structured (Scope, Method, Findings, Sensitivity, Budget Note). Add explicit cell/sheet citations (e.g., 'See Inputs!B2') for each per-record claim and for the decision_budget_usd reference.

smoke_hvac_plan.xlsx: Present but not parseable in the grader preview; include an 'Inputs' sheet with named cells and a 'Checks' sheet listing formulas or provide a plain-text export of key formula cells to allow offline verification.
feedback_summary: Well-structured memo and present spreadsheet deliverables with clear methods and reproducible logic described. Main issues: (1) safety-blocker records (R3) appear in an economic ranking despite rubric requiring blockers override ROI, producing a ri_4 deduction; (2) the workbook could not be parsed in the preview environment (openpyxl unavailable), so formula-level verification is not currently possible; (3) some memo claims lack explicit cell/sheet citations for traceability. Overall score 0.865 with ri_4 as the failed item to address.
